title: innhom Portable Shower Camping Shower Outdoor Camp Shower Pump, Electric Rechargeable Portable Camping Shower, Powered by Rechargeable Battery
bullets: 【2 Battery with 1 Year Warranty】innhom portable shower for camping come with 2 detachable batteries and a charging cable, direct charge from USB port, car adapter or computer, laptop ( output of 5V/1A~2A ). Full charge of 2 batteries allows 90-120 mins of continuous use. LED light on battery switch can indicate the battery power. innhom portable shower comes with 1 Year Free Warranty to ensure your pleasant shopping experience. Any problems, feel free to contact us.

【Easy Assembly/Operation】Attach pump and shower head to the hose. Fully immerse the pump in water and press the switch on battery to start. The camping shower offers gentle and comfortable stream at 0.9 gal/min (3.5 L/min).

【Safe and Convenient Outdoor Camp Shower】innhom camp shower conforms to the safety requirements of RoHS standard, EN 55014-1 and EN55014-2. The water filter system ensure the water is clean and protect the shower head from being clogged. The O-ring protects water from escaping from the connection of the shower hose and showerhead.

【Small and Compact】Weights 1.6LB, bonus mesh storage bag, convenient to carry and store. Provided suction cup can fix the shower head on any smooth flat surface. Hook lets you hang the showerhead safely on trees for a convenient shower.

【Multiple-uses Portable Shower】Suitable for INDOOR/OUTDOOR showering, camping, BBQ, hiking, traveling, kid bathing, pet cleaning, car washing, plants watering, windows and backyard cleaning. Ideal gift for family, friends on Christmas, Birthday, Father's Day, Mother's Day, Children's Day, etc.

items.title: Good quality
items.body: Worked well. Flow is high, it drains the tank quickly. Added a small valve to control the flow Read more Read less
items.date_text: Reviewed in the United Arab Emirates on 23 August 2024

items.title: Very Effective
items.body: Well designed. Comes with two batteries so never out of action while charging. Good flow pressure. Seems very reliable. Read more Read less

items.title: Portable Shower
items.body: Works great. Everything was nicely bagged and packaged. It was easy to set up. You get the submersible pump, two batteries, a six foot hose with attachable showerhead, spare parts, and a mesh bag for storing it. There are a couple of hooks for hanging the shower head and a suction cup. The cord from the battery to the pump is 3 ft long and there’s a separate, short cord for battery charging. You can clamp the battery to the hose, but I would worry that it might slide down into the bucket. The batteries charged fast. [Instructions say “do not charge the battery overnight”.] I use two buckets, I have one for wetting and soaping and a 5 gallon one that I use with the pump for rinsing. Water flow is acceptable for rinsing off. Pump is on its side, not upright, which allows the water level to get lower. I was unable to stop the flow by moving the shower head as one reviewer described. I just put the shower head in the bucket and let the water recirculate. I was able to re-use the battery without recharging to full. I have not had any leaks at the fittings. I use it as hand held shower, so have not tried using the shower head hooks. I place my bucket outside the shower area, so it won’t be in my way, and loop the hose over a couple of long S hooks so it comes around the side instead of under the shower curtain. The shape of the battery on the cord allows you to hang it with an s-hook or hook it over a thin rail. I didn’t have any problems washing my long hair. I leaned over a bucket so I wouldn’t splash water, rinsed, put the shower head in the water bucket, did my shampooing and then rinsed it off. I used a non-rinsing conditioner. This pump got me through my 3 week home renovation. If it dies tomorrow, I’ll still be happy. Read more Read less
items.date_text: Reviewed in the United States on 12 August 2023

items.title: Faulty
items.body: I tested mine in the bathroom which seemed to work well. Took it out camping the next day and the motor was already broken. Was really disappointed in the product, and the company’s customer service were no help. Thankfully Amazon were cool and gave me a refund. Read more Read less
items.date_text: Reviewed in the United Kingdom on 28 May 2022

items.title: Good dog shower
items.body: Got this to hose down the dog during walks in the hot summer. It’s just the shower so I use a cooler to hold the water. Keep it in the back of the car. Works great. Very simple. Also been super pleased with the battery life. Put both batteries in the car not knowing how long a charge would last. Now I’m just rinsing her to a minute or two at a time, 3-5 times a walk. But it’s been almost two weeks and I’m still on the first charge on the first battery. And while the spray isn’t going to knock anyone over, it’s pretty impressive from a pump powered off a rechargeable battery you charged via USB. If you just need to rinse a day’s sweat off, or maybe sand after a day at the beach, this should work just fine. Would definitely recommend. Read more Read less
items.date_text: Reviewed in the United States on 7 June 2024
